variants.title: Donaldson P171783 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec B120C40
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P171783 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec B120C40
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P171783 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 30µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 54.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 23.0 mm, Length: 50.0 mm, Seal Material: Plastisol, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 30µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Seal: Plastisol

variants.title: Filtrec B120C40 Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec B120C40. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the B120C40 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.

The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 12532 Filter | Replaces the Filtrec B120C40
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SA 12532 Filter | Replaces the Filtrec B120C40
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 12532 Air Filter. Designed to deliver superior protection to engines and machinery, this air filter captures airborne contaminants before they can cause damage. High-efficiency filtration media traps dust, dirt, and debris, ensuring a consistent flow of clean air that supports optimal combustion and engine performance. Versatile across industries—from construction equipment to agricultural machinery—it offers high dust-holding capacity and long-lasting durability. By extending engine life, improving fuel efficiency, and reducing emissions, it ensures equipment runs smoothly and reliably.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 55.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 25.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 25.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 47.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 45.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 30µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 54.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 23.0 mm, Length: 50.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Seal: Plastisol, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C
